body:
## Run 3 — implementation verified already complete

This is a third agent run for issue #2440 (SEO: Dimmu Borgir 'Death Cult Armageddon' drum setup article).

**Status:** Implementation fully complete from prior run. No changes needed.

**Verified:**
- `death-cult-armageddon-drum-setup` entry present in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` (line 52761)
- `/public/llms/articles/death-cult-armageddon-drum-setup.md` exists (963 words, ≥300 required)
- 5 FAQ Q&A pairs present (≥3 required): kit, cymbals, cost, Czech Philharmonic context, Evangelion comparison
- `relatedAlbums: ['evangelion-drum-setup', 'the-satanist-drum-setup']` confirmed
- Schema: `['MusicAlbum', 'Person', 'FAQPage']` confirmed
- JS syntax valid (`node --check` passes)
- Tama Starclassic Performer + Meinl Byzance Traditional gear documented
- Czech Philharmonic / Abbey Road angle covered
- Internal links: daray-drum-setup, evangelion-drum-setup, the-satanist-drum-setup
title: SEO: Dimmu Borgir 'Death Cult Armageddon' drum setup article (Daray, 2003 — first Dimmu Borgir album article, symphonic black metal TAM anchor)
